title: Tampasi
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Tampasi''' was the [[Ferroan]] concept that roughly translated into [[Galactic Basic Standard/Legends|Basic]] as "forest". It was used to describe the forest of [[Zonama Sekot/Legends|Zonama Sekot]]. Such forests were also on [[Tandun III]] up until its explosion in [[43 ABY]].

After the end of the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]] several of their [[biot]]s joined the Tampasi as they reverted to their natural forms.

==Appearances==
*''[[Rogue Planet]]''
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Force Heretic III: Reunion]]''
*''[[The New Jedi Order: The Unifying Force]]''
*[[Millennium Falcon (novel)|''Millennium Falcon'']] {{Ab|Millennium Falcon (audiobook)}}
